info.name: Apache Log4j2 Remote Code Execution (Log4Shell)
info.description: Apache Log4j2 JNDI features do not protect against attacker-controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints, allowing remote code execution.

info.name: Git Configuration Exposure
info.description: A .git/config file was exposed, potentially leaking repository metadata and remote URLs.

info.name: Git Configuration Exposure
info.description: A .git/config file was exposed, potentially leaking repository metadata and remote URLs.

info.name: Deprecated TLS 1.0 Supported
info.description: The server supports the deprecated TLS 1.0 protocol.

info.name: Missing Security Headers
info.description: One or more recommended HTTP security headers are missing.
